_notes.purpose: JSON-LD structured data draft for Four Winds Roots Pharmacy website. All TODO fields must be confirmed with the pharmacy owner before production use. This file is the source of truth — copy into the Astro site/src/data/schema.json when confirmed.
_notes.standard: Schema.org Pharmacy type (extends LocalBusiness > MedicalBusiness). Embed as <script type='application/ld+json'> in the <head> of every page via BaseLayout.

name: Four Winds Roots Pharmacy
_TODO_name: Confirm canonical name with owner. Options: 'Four Winds Roots Pharmacy' | 'R.O.O.T.S. Four Winds Pharmacy' | 'Roots Four Winds Pharmacy'. Pick ONE and use it everywhere.
_TODO_alternateName: Remove variants that owner does not recognise as legitimate alternate names.
disambiguatingDescription: Independent holistic pharmacy at 3932A Keele St, North York. Not affiliated with Can Pharm Services or Guardian Pharmacy.
_TODO_disambiguatingDescription: See gbp-disambiguation.md. This field helps Google separate Four Winds Roots from the legacy Guardian Four Winds listing at the same address.
description: Four Winds Roots Pharmacy is North York's holistic community pharmacy at Keele & Finch — offering prescription services, herb–drug interaction reviews, optical care, blister packaging, and free local delivery. Rated 4.9★ by the community.

geo._TODO_geo: Confirm exact coordinates via Google Maps or GBP. The values below are approximate.

_TODO_phone: Confirm (416) 398-8200 belongs to Four Winds Roots and not Can Pharm Services — see gbp-disambiguation.md.
_TODO_url: Confirm domain with owner before registering. Options: fourwindsrootspharmacy.ca | rootspharmacy.ca | fourwindspharmacy.ca. Check availability.

openingHoursSpecification._TODO_hours: All hours below are PLACEHOLDERS. Confirm exact hours with owner, including Sunday and holiday hours.

_TODO_sunday: If Four Winds is open Sunday, add a Sunday OpeningHoursSpecification. No competitor is open Sunday — this is a major differentiator if applicable.

aggregateRating._TODO_rating: Do not publish until confirmed against live GBP data. The 4.9★ figure is from directory listings — verify the exact count and source via the Google Business Profile.

hasMap: TODO: Add Google Maps URL or GBP CID link after GBP is claimed
sameAs: TODO: Google Business Profile URL (after claiming)
knowsLanguage: TODO: Confirm additional languages spoken with owner (CHL directory mentions possible multilingual services)
paymentAccepted: Cash, Credit Card, Debit, ODB (Ontario Drug Benefit)
_TODO_medicalSpecialty: Confirm optical services scope with owner. If a licensed optometrist is on staff, 'Optometry' applies. If it is a retail optical/wellness product centre, adjust accordingly.
_TODO_services: Confirm full service list with owner. Add/remove items based on what is actually offered. Do not claim services not offered (OCP advertising compliance).

itemOffered.name: Free Prescription Delivery
itemOffered.description: Free delivery of prescription medications to patients in the North York area.

itemOffered.name: Blister Packaging
itemOffered.description: Medication organized into blister packs for adherence. No extra charge.

_TODO_member: Add named pharmacist(s). OCP registration number should appear on the website as a trust signal. Confirm from OCP public register: https://www.ocpinfo.com/

_implementation_notes.embed_in_astro: In site/src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro, import this JSON and render as: <script type='application/ld+json' set:html={JSON.stringify(schemaData)} />
_implementation_notes.remove_TODO_keys: Before production, remove all keys starting with '_TODO_' and '_notes'. These are documentation only.
_implementation_notes.validate: Run through https://validator.schema.org/ after each change.
_implementation_notes.google_rich_results: Test with https://search.google.com/test/rich-results for Pharmacy rich result eligibility.
